title: No Roman Numerals [NRN]
description: Changes Roman Numerals to Arabic Numerals for enchantments and potions.
body:
# Information

This small resource pack removes Roman numerals for enchantments and potions and replaces them with Arabic numerals, up to level 255.

This resource pack also has a [mod version](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-roman-numerals/) that even changes the hardcoded Beacon numeral.

# Other Versions

+ [No Roman Numerals](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-roman-numerals)
+ [More Roman Numerals](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-roman-numerals)
